page_metadata.biotools__summary: Tool that performs de novo annotation of SNPs, STSs, and exons. It also allows for the migration of user-defined annotations onto different versions of genomic sequences (&lt,30Kb size limit).
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Tool that performs de novo annotation of SNPs, STSs, and exons. It also allows for the migration of user-defined annotations onto different versions of genomic sequences (&lt,30Kb size limit).
